input.content:
---
name: CC hooks format gotcha
description: Claude Code hooks require matcher + hooks array format, not direct command field
type: feedback
---

CC settings.json hooks use `{ "matcher": "", "hooks": [{ "type": "command", "command": "..." }] }`, NOT `{ "matcher": "", "command": "..." }`. The direct command format causes a settings parse error on session start.

**Why:** Discovered when user tried opening a second CC session and got a Settings Error. The install command was writing the wrong format.
**How to apply:** Always use the hooks array format when writing to settings.json. Test by opening a fresh CC session after install.

reason: No matching rule — falling back to default
